subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Strive ye to become, in the spiritual gathering, the source of divine inspirations and the cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء جهدی کنید که در محفل روحانی مصدر سنوحات رحمانی شوید و باعث
subcodes.subjects: @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
